name: Portuguese-Style Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 Linguica sausage, about 6 cut into 1/4-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute diced sausage in a heavy saucepan until browned, about 5 minutes.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. Add rice, stirring well to coat grains.
4. Add water and salt, then bring to a boil.
5. Lower heat, cover pan, and simmer for 19 minutes, or until grains are soft and water has evaporated.
6. Stir in cilantro.
Serves 4.
PER SERVING: 215 calories, 6 g protein, 28 g carbohydrate, 8 g fat (3 g saturated), 2 mg cholesterol, 316 mg sodium, 0 g fiber.
